Assumes exchange commission c is charged on positive lay winnings for this isolated market.
Positive iff O_back*(1-c) > O_lay-c. The reciprocal-sum test is not valid for a lay quote.

canonical_formula_or_rule: Do not use 1 + (O_lay-1)*(1-c) as a universal effective lay price
assumptions_and_notes: Commission applies to net market winnings and cash-flow structure; aggregation across exchange positions changes treatment.

canonical_formula_or_rule: Evaluate outcome-specific after-fee cash flows; min_outcome(net_return_outcome) > total_committed_capital
assumptions_and_notes: Generic percentage subtraction can be wrong for turnover taxes, commissions, gas, rebates or withdrawal fees.

canonical_formula_or_rule: Solve constrained allocation using exact venue increments; verify every outcome after rounding
assumptions_and_notes: Rounding can destroy the guarantee even when the continuous solution is positive.
